column1: DeepMind Meet Dorsey Dorsey Parker is a musician. He also has 8% vision, and is losing the sight he has. Dorsey’s using Project Astra to adapt to this change in his life. Using his phone, Project Astra describes his surroundings, and accesses apps like Lens and Maps to help him explore new places.
Assistance across devices Project Astra works on Android phones and prototype glasses. Cross-device memory means you can switch devices and carry on the same conversation.
